name: Ollama Vision
description: Local Ollama vision engine for Switchbay. Describe images, generate LoRA training captions, and produce person-focused descriptions using local Qwen VL models — all with JSON output for agent consumption.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check Ollama connectivity and list available vision models.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all models currently available in the local Ollama instance.

tools.name: describe
tools.description: Generate a detailed general description of an image using a local Ollama VL model.

model.description: Ollama VL model name (e.g. qwen2.5vl:4b, qwen2.5vl:2b).

image_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the image file on disk.

prompt.description: Optional custom prompt to guide the description.

tools.name: describe_person
tools.description: Generate a person-focused description of a photo for LoRA training caption use. Focuses on face, hair, skin tone, build, and features. Ignores background. Optionally refines the output with a second text model pass.

model.description: Ollama VL model name (e.g. qwen2.5vl:4b, qwen2.5vl:2b).

image_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the image file on disk.

subject.description: Optional subject hint to anchor the model (e.g. 'a woman in her 30s').

refine_model.description: Optional text model for a second refinement pass (e.g. qwen2.5:3b). Produces a cleaner training caption.

tools.name: caption
tools.description: Generate a short image caption in one of three styles: training (LoRA/dataset), alttext (accessibility), or tweet (social).

model.description: Ollama VL model name (e.g. qwen2.5vl:4b, qwen2.5vl:2b).

image_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the image file on disk.
